prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Workforce Statistics Guide pertains specifically to HM Prison and Probation Service (HMPPS), which operates within England and Wales. It includes detailed statistics about staffing across public sector prisons and probation services specifically in these two countries, making it applicable to England.
